testcase.name: AnalyticsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/analytics/record > should record pageview analytics
AnalyticsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/analytics/record > should record event analytics with data
AnalyticsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/analytics/record > should reject invalid analytics type with 500 (ZodError)
AnalyticsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/article/:id/view > should record article view
AnalyticsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/article/:id/view > should reject invalid article ID

testcase.name: AnalyticsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/article/:id/reading-time > should record reading time
AnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/analytics/overview > should require authentication
AnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/analytics/overview > should return analytics overview with auth
AnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/analytics/page-rankings > should return page rankings
AnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/analytics/referrers > should return referrer statistics
AnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/analytics/chart > should return chart data
AnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/analytics/devices > should return device statistics
AnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/analytics/browsers > should return browser statistics
AnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/analytics/articles/top > should return top articles
AnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/analytics/export > should export analytics data
AnalyticsController (e2e) > ETag & DerivedView caching > should return ETag header on cached analytics endpoints
AnalyticsController (e2e) > ETag & DerivedView caching > should return 304 when If-None-Match matches ETag
AnalyticsController (e2e) > ETag & DerivedView caching > should cache analytics data with different query parameters
AnalyticsController (e2e) > ETag & DerivedView caching > should return fresh data when cache is invalidated
Anonymous visitor token (e2e) > POST /api/v2/auth/anonymous should issue an anonymous access token
Anonymous visitor token (e2e) > GET /api/v2/sitemap/status should be accessible with anonymous token (viewer role -> sitemap:read)
Anonymous visitor token (e2e) > GET /api/v2/sitemap/urls should be accessible with anonymous token (viewer role -> sitemap:read)
Anonymous visitor token (e2e) > POST /api/v2/sitemap/generate should be forbidden (403) with anonymous token (missing sitemap:generate)
AppController (e2e) > / (GET)
ArticleController - by-path (e2e) > GET /api/v2/articles/by-path/:pathname should return the article
ArticleController - by-path (e2e) > GET /api/v2/articles/by-path/:pathname should 404 for non-existing

testcase.name: ArticleController - verify by pathname (e2e) > should deny access to private article by pathname without token
ArticleController - verify by pathname (e2e) > should verify password by pathname and then access article with token
BootstrapController - extensions field (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/bootstrap should include extensions field
BootstrapController - extensions field (e2e) > extensions field should contain plugin data when plugins are registered
BootstrapController - extensions field (e2e) > should handle plugin data transformation via hooks
BootstrapController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/bootstrap should return 200 and expected structure
CSRF Protection (e2e) > should get CSRF token from endpoint
CustomPageController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/customPage/all > should return empty array when no custom pages exist
CustomPageController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/customPage/all > should return all custom pages
CustomPageController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/customPage > should require path parameter

Anonymous Permission Chain (e2e) > should validate anonymous permission chain

testcase.name: HealthController (e2e) > /api/v2/health (GET)
Hook Integration (e2e) > Article Hook Integration > should trigger article|beforeCreate filter hook
Hook Integration (e2e) > Article Hook Integration > should trigger article|afterCreate action hook
Hook Integration (e2e) > Article Hook Integration > should trigger article|beforeUpdate filter hook
Hook Integration (e2e) > Article Hook Integration > should trigger article|beforeDelete and article|afterDelete hooks
Hook Integration (e2e) > Draft Hook Integration > should trigger draft|beforeCreate filter hook
Hook Integration (e2e) > Draft Hook Integration > should trigger draft|afterCreate action hook
Hook Integration (e2e) > Draft Hook Integration > should trigger draft|beforeUpdate filter hook
Hook Integration (e2e) > Draft Hook Integration > should trigger draft|beforeDelete and draft|afterDelete hooks
Hook Integration (e2e) > Hook Service Management > should allow adding and removing hooks
Hook Integration (e2e) > Hook Service Management > should handle multiple hooks for the same event
Hook Integration (e2e) > Comment Hook Integration > should trigger comment|beforeUpdate filter hook
Hook Integration (e2e) > Comment Hook Integration > should trigger comment|afterUpdate action hook
InitController (e2e) - CMS Initialization Flow > POST /api/v2/public/init initializes CMS and creates an admin user
InitController (e2e) - CMS Initialization Flow > allows the created admin to login via /api/v2/auth/login
InitController (e2e) - CMS Initialization Flow > repeated initialization returns 409 Conflict

testcase.name: InitController (e2e) - CMS Initialization Flow > DB asserts: admin user has type=admin and permissions ["role:admin"]
LoginLog Ts-Rest (e2e) > GET /api/v2/auth/logs should return 200 and array
LoginLog Ts-Rest (e2e) > GET /api/v2/auth/logs/failed-attempts/by-username returns count
LoginLog Ts-Rest (e2e) > GET /api/v2/auth/logs/failed-attempts/by-ip returns count
OptionsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/options should return 200 with empty include
OptionsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/options?include=articles should return articles
OptionsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/options?include=categories,tags should return categories and tags
OptionsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/options?include=siteMeta should return site metadata
OptionsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/options?include=navigation,friendLinks should return navigation and friend links
OptionsController (e2e) > Cache key should respect query params (different results for different include)
OptionsController (e2e) > Should handle invalid include values gracefully
OptionsController (e2e) > Include order should be ignored (categories,tags == tags,categories)
OptionsController (e2e) > Duplicate include values should be de-duplicated
OptionsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/options?include=tags should not crash with dirty JSON in articles.tags
Permissions Decorators (e2e) > GET /api/v2/perm-test/a - @Permission("permtest", ["read"]) > 401 without auth
Permissions Decorators (e2e) > GET /api/v2/perm-test/a - @Permission("permtest", ["read"]) > 200 with permtest:read
Permissions Decorators (e2e) > GET /api/v2/perm-test/a - @Permission("permtest", ["read"]) > 403 with write only
Permissions Decorators (e2e) > GET /api/v2/perm-test/b - @Permission("permtest:read","permtest:write") > 403 with read only
Permissions Decorators (e2e) > GET /api/v2/perm-test/b - @Permission("permtest:read","permtest:write") > 200 with read+write
Permissions Decorators (e2e) > GET /api/v2/perm-test/c - @Perm("permtest", ["write"]) > 200 with write
Permissions Decorators (e2e) > GET /api/v2/perm-test/c - @Perm("permtest", ["write"]) > 403 with read only
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins > 401 when no auth
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins > 403 when no setting:read permission
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins > 200 with setting:read
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins/logs > 401 when no auth
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins/logs > 200 with setting:read
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins/logs > 403 when only setting:update (no read)
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins/install > 403 when only setting:read
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins/install > 500 with invalid Zod validation (ZodError not converted to 400 yet)
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins/install > 200 with setting:update and valid plugins
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins/install > 200 but failure response when plugin installation fails
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins/uninstall > 403 when only setting:read
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins/uninstall > 500 with invalid Zod validation (ZodError not converted to 400 yet)
PicgoPluginsController (e2e) > POST /api/v2/admin/media/picgo/plugins/uninstall > 200 but always returns failure due to PicGo limitation
PublicAnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/analytics/public/overview should return overview with basic fields
PublicAnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/analytics/public/article/:id should return sanitized stats for the article
PublicAnalyticsController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/analytics/public/page-rankings should return sanitized paths and counts
SettingCoreService read-path default persistence (e2e) > should persist default on first read and return it
SettingCoreService read-path default persistence (e2e) > should not overwrite stored value on subsequent reads with a different default
SettingCoreService read-path default persistence (e2e) > should persist one of the defaults when two concurrent first reads supply different defaults
SettingCoreService read-path default persistence (e2e) > should throw when default exceeds MAX_JSON_LENGTH during first read persistence
SettingRegistryService Concurrency & Edge (e2e) > should upsert concurrently into a single row for the same key
SettingRegistryService Concurrency & Edge (e2e) > should reject oversized payloads with BadRequestException
SettingsController Validation (e2e) > PATCH /api/v2/admin/settings/site-info should return 400 on invalid payload

testcase.name: SitemapController - generate & XML (e2e) > POST /api/v2/sitemap/generate should create sitemap.xml with basic URLs
SitemapController - generate & XML (e2e) > should respect settings.sitemapExtraStaticPaths and include extra URLs
SitemapController - permissions (e2e) > POST /api/v2/sitemap/generate > should return 401 without auth
SitemapController - permissions (e2e) > POST /api/v2/sitemap/generate > should return 403 with sitemap:read only (missing sitemap:generate)
SitemapController - permissions (e2e) > POST /api/v2/sitemap/generate > should allow with sitemap:generate
SitemapController - permissions (e2e) > GET /api/v2/sitemap/status > should require auth
SitemapController - permissions (e2e) > GET /api/v2/sitemap/status > should allow with sitemap:read
SitemapController - permissions (e2e) > GET /api/v2/sitemap/urls > should require auth
SitemapController - permissions (e2e) > GET /api/v2/sitemap/urls > should allow with sitemap:read
TagController (e2e) - dirty JSON regression > GET /api/v2/tags should not fail with invalid JSON in articles.tags and counts should ignore invalid/hidden rows
TimelineController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/timeline should group by year and exclude hidden/private by default
TimelineController (e2e) > GET /api/v2/public/timeline?includeHidden=true should include hidden but still exclude private
TimelineController (e2e) > Cache key should respect query params (different results for different includeHidden)
V1 API Deprecation (e2e) > should return 410 Gone for v1 public endpoints

testcase.system-out: 2026-01-25 09:23:27 [33m[33mwarn[33m[39m: [V1DeprecationMiddleware] Deprecated V1 API access attempt: GET /api/v1/public/getTimeLineInfo from ::ffff:127.0.0.1

testcase.name: V1 API Deprecation (e2e) > should allow v2 endpoints to work normally
V1 API Deprecation (e2e) > should allow non-api paths to work normally
Article Publishing Workflow (e2e) > Basic publish workflow: Create → Edit → Verify > should complete full article creation and modification cycle
Article Publishing Workflow (e2e) > Article with tags and categories > should preserve tag and category relationships
Article Publishing Workflow (e2e) > Private article with password protection > should create unpublished article and verify access control
Article Publishing Workflow (e2e) > Concurrent article edits safety > should handle concurrent edits without data loss
Article Publishing Workflow (e2e) > Article with media references > should preserve media references in article content
Media Upload Pipeline (e2e) > Single image upload and processing > should upload image and verify processing
Media Upload Pipeline (e2e) > Batch upload > should handle multiple uploads in sequence
Media Upload Pipeline (e2e) > Concurrent upload isolation > should maintain data consistency with sequential uploads
Media Upload Pipeline (e2e) > Media metadata > should preserve metadata during upload
Media Upload Pipeline (e2e) > Media deletion > should delete media and verify removal
Media Upload Pipeline (e2e) > Batch media operations > should handle batch deletion of multiple media files
Media Upload Pipeline (e2e) > Media list and pagination > should list media with pagination
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Plugin initialization and hook system > should verify plugins are loaded on startup
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Plugin initialization and hook system > should provide plugin metadata endpoint
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Plugin hook execution > should trigger hooks when articles are created
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Plugin hook execution > should maintain data integrity with filter hooks
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Multiple plugin isolation > should verify plugin isolation - one plugin error does not affect others
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Bootstrap data with plugins > should include plugin-provided data in bootstrap response
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Plugin configuration > should read and apply plugin configuration
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Settings integration with plugins > should trigger plugin hooks when settings are updated
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Article update hooks > should trigger hooks on article updates
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Article deletion hooks > should trigger hooks when articles are deleted

testcase.name: Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > Category creation with hooks > should trigger hooks when categories are created/updated
Plugin Lifecycle Integration (e2e) > RSS feed generation with hooks > should generate RSS feed (verifies RSS plugin hooks)
